coreMeaning.en: extreme superstitious fear of the number 13

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tris(三)+kai(和)+deka(十)+phobia(恐惧)=对13的恐惧

coreMeaning.en: a motif consisting of three spirals or legs radiating from a center

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+skelion(腿)=三条腿旋转的纹章图案

coreMeaning.en: persistent spasm of the jaw muscles causing inability to open the mouth

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trismus = 下颌肌肉痉挛，无法张口

coreMeaning.cn: 三钠的；含三个钠原子的

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+sodium(钠)=含三个钠的化合物

coreMeaning.en: a condition in which an extra chromosome is present in cell nuclei

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+somy(染色体)=三条染色体，如唐氏综合征
triste = 法语悲伤，文学语境中使用

coreMeaning.cn: 陈腐的；平庸的；老一套的
coreMeaning.en: overused and consequently of little thought or originality; clichéd

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trite来自Latin tritus(磨光了的)=被磨光了的陈词滥调
trite + ly = 以陈腐方式

coreMeaning.en: the quality of being trite; lack of originality

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trite + ness = 陈腐的性质

coreMeaning.cn: 小黑麦；黑小麦杂交品种
coreMeaning.en: a hybrid cereal grain created by crossing wheat and rye

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Triticum(小麦)+Secale(黑麦)=小黑麦杂交种

coreMeaning.en: a radioactive isotope of hydrogen with mass number 3

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+ium=质量数为3的氢同位素
triumph = 罗马将军凯旋仪式→胜利

coreMeaning.en: relating to or celebrating a triumph

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: triumph + al = 凯旋相关的；triumphal arch = 凯旋门

coreMeaning.en: having achieved a victory; rejoicing in a victory

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: triumph + ant = 正在享受胜利的
triumphant + ly = 欢呼雀跃地

coreMeaning.en: past tense of triumph; won a victory

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: triumph + ed = 已经胜利了
triumph + ing = 正在获胜中
triumph的复数

coreMeaning.cn: 三头政治成员；三执政之一
coreMeaning.en: one of three leaders sharing power equally

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+vir(男人/大人)=三执政之一

coreMeaning.en: a political regime dominated by three powerful leaders

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+vir(人)+ate=三人执政集体；如凯撒三头政治
triumvirate的复数
triumvir的复数

coreMeaning.en: three in one; being three in one (especially the Trinity)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+une(一)=三合一的；三位一体

coreMeaning.en: a tripod or three-legged stand for supporting cookware over a fire

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+vet(脚)=三脚锅架
trivet的复数

coreMeaning.en: details, considerations, or pieces of information of little importance

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+via(路)=三叉路口=俗事→琐事
imageChain: 路口→人来人往→话题琐碎

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trivium(三叉路口)+al=大路边传播的平凡话题=琐碎的
triviality的复数

coreMeaning.en: the quality of being trivial; something trivial

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trivial + ity = 琐碎的性质

coreMeaning.cn: 使显得不重要；轻视；淡化
coreMeaning.en: to make something appear less important than it is

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trivial + ize = 主动让某事显得微不足道
trivialize + d = 已被轻视淡化的
trivialize的第三人称单数
trivialize + ing = 正在淡化中

coreMeaning.en: in a trivial manner; with little importance

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trivial + ly = 无足轻重地

coreMeaning.cn: 三科（中世纪文法、修辞、逻辑三学科）
coreMeaning.en: three subjects of grammar, rhetoric, and logic in medieval education

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+vium(路)=三条路=中世纪文科三基础
imageChain: 三叉路→三学科→文法修辞逻辑

coreMeaning.en: relating to or consisting of trochees (strong-weak metrical feet)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trochee(扬抑格)+ic=扬抑格的诗歌节奏

coreMeaning.en: a metrical foot with one stressed syllable followed by one unstressed

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trochee = 强弱拍，如'tiger'→TI-ger

coreMeaning.en: past tense of tread; walked or stepped on

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: trod = tread的不规则过去时，步行踩过

coreMeaning.en: a proper name; a knight of the Round Table in Arthurian legend

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Tristan = 亚瑟王传说中的骑士，与Isolde的爱情故事

coreMeaning.en: a variant of the name Tristan; character in Arthurian legend

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Tristram = Tristan的变体，也是Sterne小说主角

coreMeaning.en: to grind or crush something to a fine powder

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tritur(磨)+ate=把东西磨碎成粉末

coreMeaning.en: the process of grinding or crushing to a fine powder

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: triturate + ation = 研磨过程

coreMeaning.en: a sea god in Greek mythology; a genus of newts; a tritium nucleus

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Triton = 波塞冬之子，半人半鱼海神；也指蝾螈

coreMeaning.en: a chromosomal condition with an extra copy of a chromosome

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: tri(三)+somy(染色体)=三体21→唐氏综合征

coreMeaning.en: former name of Thiruvananthapuram, capital of Kerala, India

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Trivandrum = 喀拉拉邦首府的旧英文名
